title: Leptochilus ellipticus
intro: Leptochilus ellipticus, also known as Elliptic Pilea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Leptochilus ellipticus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Leptochilus ellipticus is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections.
